state_drift.description: v1 interpreted bare P1 as historical local subtask P1.2, but the raw prompt has no board-context preamble and the current validation DB has no local P1 row.
state_drift.evidence: Current data/taskflow/taskflow.db: board-laizys-taskflow has P1.2 done with parent_task_id=P1, while bare P1 resolves in the org tree to board-seci-taskflow P1.
state_drift.expected_with_historical_snapshot: With the historical pre-turn snapshot/context, v2 should resolve the user shorthand to P1.2 and add the note there.

state_drift.description: v1 moved a historical local P1, but the current validation DB no longer has that local P1 row; bare P1 now resolves to a different SECI project.
state_drift.evidence: Current data/taskflow/taskflow.db: no board-laizys-taskflow P1 row exists; board-seci-taskflow P1 is CIIAR Brasil, not v1's 'Adesão Ata/Prefeitura de Nísia Floresta' final response.
state_drift.expected_with_historical_snapshot: With the historical pre-turn snapshot, v2 should move the then-existing local P1 to waiting with the PGM legal-opinion reason.

state_drift.description: v1 recorded SEC-T41 while it was still active/waiting, but the current validation DB already has SEC-T41 completed with the same CMG note present.
state_drift.evidence: Current data/taskflow/taskflow.db: board-sec-taskflow T41 column=done, child_exec_board_id=board-laizys-taskflow, note 'Processo enviado para a CMG. Aguardando retorno com aprovação.' already exists.
state_drift.expected_with_historical_snapshot: With a pre-completion snapshot, v2 should preserve SEC-T41, add the note on board-sec-taskflow, and move SEC-T41 to waiting.

state_drift.description: v1 recorded a resume on SEC-T75 before the note/state already existed in the current DB; the current DB has SEC-T75 waiting and the 'Refazendo o ETP e o TR.' note already present.
state_drift.evidence: Current data/taskflow/taskflow.db: board-sec-taskflow T75 column=waiting, child_exec_board_id=board-laizys-taskflow, note 'Refazendo o ETP e o TR.' already exists.
state_drift.expected_with_historical_snapshot: With the historical pre-turn snapshot, v2 should add the note and resume SEC-T75 from waiting.
